articles.title: Three killed in gas leak in Jharkhand's Dhanbad
articles.description: Some people went to steal iron scrap. It appears they might have cut through a gas cylinder that was full. The smell was so strong that they fainted, says Manika Tiwari, in charge of the Munidih police station

dailyNews.description: Most Americans oppose the US-Israel war on Iran. ​​No recent US war has ever started off being this unpopular.

dailyNews.description: Trump announced the rescue on his Truth Social platform, and heaped praise on the US military for pulling off 'one of the most daring Search and Rescue Operations in U.S. History (sic).’ The US President also gave details about how the rescue was carried out.

dailyNews.description: Iran war starts pinching US as gas prices, transport costs surge  Business Standard

dailyNews.title: Iran vows to open ‘gates of hell’ for US forces, mocks Trump's 48-hr Hormuz ultimatum — ‘helpless, nervous…stupid’
dailyNews.description: Trump's escalating rhetoric over the Strait of Hormuz comes amid a steep rise in global oil prices. While the price of Brent Crude has increased over 50% since the start of the war, gas prices have also seen a steep increase in the US, which goes for crucial midterm elections later this year.

dailyNews.title: ‘Dystopian death market!’ Congress targets prediction market platforms for betting on Iran war - Here's how they work
dailyNews.description: Polymarket has removed a prediction market page allowing bets on the rescue of US airmen after political backlash. Congressman Seth Moulton criticised the platform, leading to its removal. He emphasized the need for regulation of prediction markets by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission.

dailyNews.title: Iran says Iraqi ships can pass Strait of Hormuz as transits tick up
dailyNews.description: Tehran says Iraq will face no restrictions in waterway, praising country's 'struggle' against the US.

dailyNews.description: The Michigan Wolverines routed the Arizona Wildcats 91-73 in the Final Four, earning their first national championship game appearance since 2018.

dailyNews.title: DHS slams Democrat Sen Chris Van Hollen claim, says illegal alien caused crash while fleeing ICE
dailyNews.description: DHS pushes back on Sen. Van Hollen's claims about an asylum seeker, saying the man allegedly evaded ICE officers and caused a crash in Baltimore.

dailyNews.title: Illegal migrant charged in deadly 124 mph chase that killed pregnant teen, unborn child
dailyNews.description: DHS announced an ICE detainer was filed against an illegal immigrant accused in a high-speed chase crash that killed a pregnant 17-year-old and her unborn child.

dailyNews.title: UConn dispatches Illinois to make third men's national title game in four years

dailyNews.title: Trump gives Iran 48-hour deadline to reopen Strait of Hormuz or "Hell will reign down"

dailyNews.title: How Trump's change to H-1B visas is impacting workers with aspirations to come to the U.S.
dailyNews.description: For decades, the U.S. has imported highly-skilled tech workers from around the world on H-1B visas. But the Trump administration changed the way they are granted. Shanelle Kaul reports on how that is impacting the pipeline of global talent coming to America.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
